Thanks for contributing to Code UX! Please target the `dev` branch (not `main`).
Keep PRs small and focused. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` — no behavior change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] Other (describe):

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run and results. For UI changes, attach screenshots/GIFs. -->

```
# e.g. pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `dev` and targeting `dev`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`, `pnpm run test:backend` (+ `test:dashboard` for UI), and `pnpm run build` pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs under `docs/` for any behavior change
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies / UI frameworks added without discussion
